column1: Wed, 19 Sep 2001 15:01:19 -0700 (PDT),"Jones, Shelly",Tax Houston,"""Activities with the Bosses""   Nutcracker Market  Invitation","confirmed

column2: RE: ""Activities with the Bosses""   Nutcracker Market  Invitation
Activities with the Bosses""   Nutcracker Market  Invitation

column1: Please join us for the 21st annual Nutcracker Market, ""A World of Holiday Shopping""  by attending the Foley's Fashion Show and Holiday Brunch.
Nutcracker hostesses:  Patty Lee, Beth Apke, Susan Musch, Donette Dewar

What a perfect way to start your holiday shopping, spend some time with the bosses and mingle with your co-workers. There are 36 tickets available; they will be distributed on a first-come first-served basis.   Please r.s.v.p. to Shelly Jones (shelly.jones@enron.com)."
